The classification of Catunaregam oocarpa is further detailed in the APG III classification system, where it is classified under the order Gentianales.

intro: Catunaregam oocarpa, also known as Oocarpa, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various diseases such as fever, malaria, and respiratory infections.
